## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      2 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Feb 12, 2026 - May 1, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Bruh1938475_, May 1, 2026, 3/5: "WHY DOES THIS APP CRASH ALL THE TIME?"
            2. _Snakeo101_, Feb 12, 2026, 4/5: "Really like the app. I’m subscribed to the free trial and am considering getting the year. Two issues I have that if fixed would make this app amazing: 1) the app can be a bit laggy, which is weird because I’m using an m4 iPad Pro 2) I keep accidentally opening day view when I’m writing on the calendar. I think it’s because my hand is pressing on the day. Really annoying. Would love an option to turn this off and only toggle to day view from the top."
